svg.title: Contextual Compression Retriever in LangChain
svg.desc: A flowchart showing how LangChain's Contextual Compression Retriever fetches raw documents from a base retriever, then compresses each one by extracting only the parts relevant to the original query, before passing the lean context to the LLM.

g.text: Vector store, BM25, or any retriever
Only relevant snippets, far fewer tokens
